home.hero_desc: Everything is ready. Now use Claude Code to generate new features for your SaaS.
home.features_subtitle: Already integrated, already tested, ready to customize.

features_items.title: Authentication
features_items.description: Complete authentication with Better Auth — Magic Link, OTP, GitHub/Google OAuth

features_items.title: Database
features_items.description: PostgreSQL and Prisma ORM to manage your data with automatic migrations

features_items.title: Modern UI
features_items.description: Shadcn UI components and Tailwind CSS for a polished, responsive interface

features_items.title: Stripe Payments
features_items.description: Full Stripe integration to manage subscriptions and payments in test mode

features_items.title: Transactional Emails
features_items.description: Send emails with Resend or SMTP — React Email templates included

features_items.title: Media Storage
features_items.description: Upload and manage files with MinIO (Docker) or AWS S3

home.testimonials_subtitle: Developers and entrepreneurs who chose our starter kit to launch their SaaS quickly.

testimonials_items.name: Sophie M.
testimonials_items.text: This starter kit saved me weeks of development. The architecture is clean and extensible.

testimonials_items.name: Thomas L.
testimonials_items.text: The Better Auth + Prisma integration is top-notch. Exactly what I needed to get started quickly.

testimonials_items.name: Clara B.
testimonials_items.text: The dashboard is beautiful out-of-the-box and the Shadcn UI components are perfectly integrated.

testimonials_items.name: Marc D.
testimonials_items.text: The Stripe billing system is already configured. I was able to launch my SaaS in production in under a week.

testimonials_items.name: Léa R.
testimonials_items.text: The blog module with RBAC is exactly what I needed. The editor and contributor roles work perfectly.

testimonials_items.name: Antoine V.
testimonials_items.text: MinIO integrated from the start, Resend transactional emails ready to use. Nothing to configure, everything works.

home.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know to get started.

faqs_items.question: How do I get started with this SaaS?
faqs_items.answer: Create a free account, set up your project and start building. Our getting started guide walks you through each step.

faqs_items.question: Can I change plans at any time?
faqs_items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.

faqs_items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faqs_items.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) as well as SEPA transfers for Enterprise plans.

faqs_items.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs_items.answer: Yes, all paid plans include a 14-day free trial with no commitment. No credit card required to get started.

home.cta_desc: One command. Everything is configured. Your features are ready to implement.

about.mission_text2: Our platform combines the best technologies in a coherent, ready-to-use package — so you can focus on what really matters: creating value.
about.simplicity_desc: Intuitive tools and clear documentation to get started quickly.
about.quality_desc: Clean code, best practices and security at the core of our approach.
about.innovation_desc: Using the most modern and powerful technologies available.
about.community_desc: Collaboration and knowledge sharing with our users — open source, extensible, built to last.
